generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.example.org/base/
prefix DTDFVocab: http://www.example.org/dtdf/

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing Angle Encoder for hoist swing measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for cart movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for hoist movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart position time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist position time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360 for the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables [
        RealTimeDataLoggingService,
        GrafanaVisualizationDashboardService,
        CraneSimulationService,
        OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService,
        ContinuousValidationService
    ]
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing real-time crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time crane data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationDashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables [
        RealTimeDataLoggingService,
        CraneSimulationService
    ]
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Programming language for Physical Crane Interface application"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataLoggingService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane system design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool using Arcadia methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal movement trajectories for crane control using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulation results for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationBreachesNotification
]

instance RealTimeDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs real-time crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane operations using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane movements for trajectory planning and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories for control decisions"
]

instance ValidationBreachesNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operator notifications for validation breaches"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data logging to TimescaleDB"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization dashboard insights"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based insights for trajectory planning"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement control"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement control"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for stepper motors"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling"
]

instance ArduinoSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino-based sensor interface for collecting crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataLoggingService
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains [
        SwingAngleEncoder,
        Anemometer,
        CartPositionSensor,
        HoistPositionSensor,
        CartStepperMotor,
        HoistStepperMotor,
        TMC4671EvalMotorController,
        Electromagnet
    ]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., movement trajectories) generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and executed via the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization between physical and virtual components for validation and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized system with physical crane connected to digital services via MQTT broker and TimescaleDB, deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for database, dashboard, and MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models) and 'as operated' (real-time monitoring and validation) lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation using quantitative metrics between real-time measurements and simulation outputs, with threshold-based breach detection for system health monitoring."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for internal DT service communication; hardware interface details not specified in document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a single personal computer with Docker containerization for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana services."
]
